title: 9 Herbal Teas and Tinctures to Help New Mothers with White Patches in Mouth
description: Calendula officinalis tinctures can be a helpful natural remedy for white patches in the mouth. The tincture is made from the flowers of the Calendula officinalis plant, which contains properties such as flavonoids, carotenoids, and triterpenoid saponins. These constituents have antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to combat the fungal infection that causes oral thrush, a common cause of white patches in the mouth.
